title: Green Blade 12" Hanging Basket Holder, Weatherproof 2mm Thick, Holds Baskets up to 16"
features: Durable Construction: Crafted from robust 2mm thick metal, ensuring longevity and stability
Weatherproof Design: Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, withstanding various weather conditions
Magnetic Closure: Effortlessly secure your basket with the strong magnetic lid
Versatile Size: Accommodates baskets up to 16 inches in diameter, offering flexibility in use
Compact and Portable: L-shaped design and lightweight material for easy placement and relocation
description: Elevate your outdoor space with our robust Green Blade 12" Hanging Basket Holder, crafted from durable 2mm thick metal for long-lasting use. This L-shaped, compact holder is designed to securely hold baskets up to 16" in diameter, making it perfect for decorative plants or herbs. Its powder-coated, weatherproof finish ensures it withstands various outdoor conditions, while the magnetic closure provides easy access. Measuring 12" in depth, width, and height, it's ideal for both small and large spaces. Add a touch of greenery to your patio, balcony, or garden with this stylish and functional basket holder.
